title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 522.290 - Verdict of jury a bar, when
text:
522.290.  Verdict of jury a bar, when. — Whenever, in any action brought according to the provisions of sections 522.160 to 522.290, the jury shall find that any assignment of breach is not true, the same shall be a bar to any other or further suit by scire facias, or otherwise, for the recovery of any damages alleged to have been sustained by occasion of the same breaches so assigned.
(RSMo 1939 § 3276) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2889; 1919 § 1039; 1909 § 1246
